name: In Ogden UT, how long until I get my first workers comp check?

mainEntity.name: In Ogden UT, how long until I get my first workers comp check?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Typically 14-30 days after approval, but delays common.** Insurer reports in 14 days.[1] Key factors: Disability starts post-3 days; medical first. Follow up aggressively. Lawyer speeds process.
